name: Kaya Jade Aesthetics
tagline: Holistic, results-driven skincare in the heart of Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Kaya Jade Aesthetics is a Santa Rosa skin studio led by esthetician Kaya Lane, blending holistic care with science-based facials, peels and acne treatment.

sections.heading: Skincare that meets your skin where it is
sections.subheading: Custom facials, chemical peels and acne care from licensed esthetician Kaya Lane, blending holistic wellness with results-oriented treatments at her Santa Rosa studio.
badges: Custom-prescribed home care with every treatment

items.title: Custom Facial
items.description: A facial built around your skin's current condition, blending holistic technique with science-based products and finished with custom home-care guidance.

items.title: Dermaplane Facial
items.description: Manual exfoliation that removes dead skin and fine vellus hair for a smooth, bright finish, often paired with a peel for deeper renewal.

items.title: Chemical Peels (Face Reality & BioRePeel)
items.description: Professional peels including the Italian-made BioRePeel and a 35% TCA peel paired with dermaplaning to improve texture, hyperpigmentation, acne and scarring with little to no downtime.

items.title: Microchanneling
items.description: Controlled micro-channeling to stimulate collagen and improve skin tone and texture on the face and other targeted areas.

items.title: Acne Healing Treatment
items.description: Targeted acne care from a certified acne specialist, combining in-studio treatment with a custom home-care protocol to calm and clear the skin over time.

items.title: Dry Microdermabrasion
items.description: Gentle mechanical resurfacing for the face and full body to refine texture and renew the skin's surface.

sections.heading: About Kaya Jade Aesthetics
body: Kaya Jade Aesthetics is the Santa Rosa skin studio of Kaya Lane, a licensed esthetician, holistic facialist and certified acne specialist. After struggling with hormonal acne through her teens and early twenties, Kaya pursued an education in aesthetics and went on to work for celebrity esthetician Gina Mari in Beverly Hills, deepening her focus on results-oriented skincare under that mentorship.

Her method blends holistic wellness techniques with targeted, science-based treatments. Rather than forcing a one-size-fits-all routine, Kaya meets the skin in its current state and treats it accordingly, protecting its health and balance. In-studio treatments are paired with custom-prescribed home care so results are long-lasting and radiant.
highlights: Trained under celebrity esthetician Gina Mari in Beverly Hills
Holistic + science-based approach to every facial
